items.name: board-management-tool
items.description: This is a simple application that mimics a board management tool such as Trello but with a very limited scope. The motivation behind this is to drill down into a CQRS "Command Query Responsibility Segregation" architecture by covering a wide range of concepts such as Aggregate, Command handler, Even Store, Projection, and View with a simple domain but complex enough to highlights the challenges involved with this architecture.
